attributes.value: culture from epitype of Septoria tritici

assembly_info.comments:
The VEuPathDB Bioinformatics Resource Center (www.veupathdb.org) may also have contributed to the annotation of this genome. Annotation and related data can be viewed and updated at http://veupathdb.org and inquiries can be sent to help@veupathdb.org.
URL -- http://www.jgi.doe.gov/Mgraminicola
JGI Project ID: 4000758
The DNA was provided by G.H.J. Kema (gert.kema@wur.nl)
The strain is available from Fungal Biodiversity Center, http://www.cbs.knaw.nl
Contacts: Stephen B. Goodwin (sgoodwin@purdue.edu)
Gert H. J. Kema (gert.Kema@wur.nl)
Igor Grigoriev (ivgrigoriev@lbl.gov)
Assembly and annotation done by JGI.
